calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders DOES 1-20 dismissed. The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court order. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2022 Continued To Jul-26-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to July 26, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: G.Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
